_meta.note: Analytical overlay only (ROUTINES_V2.md §16) — illustrates results, never gates signal publication (that stays with the Signal Risk Engine, §9). Starts fresh from 2026-07-06 go-live; does NOT backfill the 82 migrated legacy trade_log.md signals or pre-overlay v2 trades (known duplicate-setup issues would distort the equity curve). counted_trade_ids prevents double-counting a trade across runs. SEEDED 2026-07-06: counted_trade_ids pre-filled with all pre-go-live setup_ids (20 resolved legacy/sig entries + 4 still-active legacy setups) so the sweep-all-uncounted rule never pulls pre-go-live trades into the equity curve — including future resolutions of legacy-071/078/079/081, which were published before go-live and are therefore excluded by the fresh-start decision. Only setups PUBLISHED on/after 2026-07-06 count.

First genuine post-go-live resolution: sig-085 XAUUSD LONG (setup_type A, confidence 86) resolved hit_sl during trw2-ny2 (~17:00 UTC) - entry and SL swept within the same M15 bar on a 3-4x-avg-volume wick, price recovered after but stop triggered first, rr_realized -1.0. pnl_usd = 10000 * 0.005 * -1.0 = -$50. current_equity 10000 -> 9950. Daily drawdown 0.5%, well below the 2% warning threshold. This is the 3rd consecutive loss in the underlying signal series (sig-084, legacy-071 excluded pre-go-live, sig-085) but the model portfolio's own trade count is just 1 (its first).

sig-086 SOLUSDT SHORT (setup_type B continuation, published 2026-07-12 weekend, TP1 hit 2026-07-13 during trw2-london) swept into the portfolio this run - first win since sig-085's loss, breaks the 3-loss streak in the underlying signal series. pnl_usd = 9950 * 0.005 * 1.87 = $93.03 (rounded). current_equity 9950 -> 10043.03, first time above the $10,000 starting balance. No weekend-gap trades pulled in beyond sig-086 itself (it was the only uncounted results_log entry). 0 new setups published across all 5 routines today (Asia/London/NY/NY2/close) despite a violent XAUUSD sub-4000 breakdown - correctly withheld, so 0 triggered/pending open risk overnight.
